movie.title: Al otro lado del túnel

movie.plot: When journalist Julia goes back home to find inspiration, she discovers her childhood friend has built a giant snow maze which prompts her to find her way to true love.
movie.title: Amazing Winter Romance

clues.plotSnippet: Jeevanandham is a social activist who fights against a monstrous MNC company…

movie.plot: Jeevanandham is a social activist who fights against a monstrous MNC company to restore farming. Because of destiny, Kathiresan impersonates Jeevanandham and leads the war.
movie.title: Kaththi

clues.plotSnippet: After a bad break-up, Jess, an offbeat young woman, moves into an…

movie.awards: Nominated for 5 Golden Globes. Another 11 wins & 69 nominations.
movie.plot: After a bad break-up, Jess, an offbeat young woman, moves into an apartment loft with three single men. Although they find her behavior very unusual, the men support her - most of the time.
movie.title: New Girl

movie.plot: The staff of Melonville's TV station put on programming that is unique in its own silly way.
